name: ncdrs_diabetes_risk_score_calculation_workflow
description: Calculate the total risk score for type 2 diabetes using the Chinese Non-Communicable Disease Risk Score (NCDRS) system.

inputs.input_desc: The patient's waist circumference in centimeters.
The patient's BMI (body mass index) value.
The patient's systolic blood pressure in millimeters of mercury (mmHg).
Whether the patient has a family history of diabetes (yes/no).

steps.step_description: Calculate the age score based on the patient's age range.

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's age range.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the age of the patient and assigns a score based on predefined ranges.
steps.detail: If 20 ≤ age ≤ 24: 0 points; if 25 ≤ age ≤ 34: 4 points; if 35 ≤ age ≤ 44: 8 points; if 45 ≤ age ≤ 54: 11 points; if 55 ≤ age ≤ 64: 12 points; if 65 ≤ age ≤ 74: 13 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the gender score based on the patient's gender.

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's gender.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the gender of the patient and assigns a score based on predefined conditions.
steps.detail: If gender is female: 0 points; if gender is male: 3 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the waist circumference score based on the patient's waist circumference range.

step_inputs.input_desc: The patient's waist circumference in centimeters.

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's waist circumference range.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the waist circumference of the patient and assigns a score based on predefined ranges.
steps.detail: If waist circumference ≤ 64.9: 0 points; if 65.0 ≤ waist circumference ≤ 69.9: 3 points; if 70.0 ≤ waist circumference ≤ 74.9: 5 points; if 75.0 ≤ waist circumference ≤ 79.9: 7 points; if 80.0 ≤ waist circumference ≤ 84.9: 8 points; if 85.0 ≤ waist circumference ≤ 89.9: 10 points; if waist circumference ≥ 90.0: 11 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the BMI score based on the patient's BMI range.

step_inputs.input_desc: The patient's BMI (body mass index) value.

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's BMI range.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the BMI of the patient and assigns a score based on predefined ranges.
steps.detail: If BMI < 23.0: 0 points; if 23.0 ≤ BMI ≤ 24.9: 3 points; if 25.0 ≤ BMI ≤ 29.9: 5 points; if BMI ≥ 30.0: 6 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the systolic blood pressure score based on the patient's systolic blood pressure range.

step_inputs.input_desc: The patient's systolic blood pressure in millimeters of mercury (mmHg).

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's systolic blood pressure range.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the systolic blood pressure of the patient and assigns a score based on predefined ranges.
steps.detail: If systolic BP < 110: 0 points; if 110 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 119: 1 point; if 120 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 129: 2 points; if 130 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 139: 3 points; if 140 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 149: 5 points; if 150 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 159: 6 points; if 160 ≤ systolic BP ≤ 169: 6 points; if systolic BP ≥ 170: 7 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the family history score based on the patient's family history of diabetes.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether the patient has a family history of diabetes (yes/no).

step_outputs.output_desc: The score assigned based on the patient's family history of diabetes.

steps.reason: This step evaluates the family history of diabetes for the patient and assigns a score based on predefined conditions.
steps.detail: If no family history: 0 points; if yes: 7 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the total risk score by summing all individual scores from the NCDRS diabetes risk assessment.

step_inputs.input_desc: The age score calculated based on the patient's age.
The gender score calculated based on the patient's gender.
The waist circumference score calculated based on the patient's waist circumference.
The BMI score calculated based on the patient's BMI.
The systolic blood pressure score calculated based on the patient's systolic blood pressure.
The family history score calculated based on the patient's family history of diabetes.

step_outputs.output_desc: The total risk score calculated by summing all individual scores.

steps.reason: This step sums all individual scores to calculate the total risk score.
steps.detail: Total score = Age score + Gender score + Waist score + BMI score + Systolic score + Family score.

output.output_desc: The total risk score calculated by summing all individual scores.
